title: Number of Ways to Split a String

testcases.input: s = "10101" Output: 4 Explanation: There are four ways to split s in 3 parts where each part contain the same number of letters '1'. "1|010|1" "1|01|01" "10|10|1" "10|1|01"
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: There are four ways to split s in 3 parts where each part contain the same number of letters '1'. "1|010|1" "1|01|01" "10|10|1" "10|1|01

testcases.input: s = "0000" Output: 3 Explanation: There are three ways to split s in 3 parts. "0|0|00" "0|00|0" "00|0|0"
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: There are three ways to split s in 3 parts. "0|0|00" "0|00|0" "00|0|0
